<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff1f8"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#e6f7ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="coreGrad" cx="50%" cy="45%" r="35%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff9c4" stop-opacity="1"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffcc80" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="petalGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff9dbb"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffc1e3"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="petalGrad2" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffd3a5"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ff9dbb"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="leafGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#a8e6cf"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#56c596"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="spark" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff" stop-opacity="1"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="soft" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#bg)"/>
  <g transform="translate(0,20)">
    <circle cx="256" cy="300" r="110" fill="url(#coreGrad)" />
    <!-- petals -->
    <g>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad)" transform="rotate(0 256 300)"/>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad2)" transform="rotate(45 256 300)"/>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad)" transform="rotate(90 256 300)"/>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad2)" transform="rotate(135 256 300)"/>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad)" transform="rotate(180 256 300)"/>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad2)" transform="rotate(225 256 300)"/>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad)" transform="rotate(270 256 300)"/>
      <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="42" ry="100" fill="url(#petalGrad2)" transform="rotate(315 256 300)"/>
    </g>

    <!-- center glow -->
    <circle cx="256" cy="300" r="60" fill="url(#spark)" opacity="0.9" />

    <!-- leaves -->
    <path d="M220 360 C160 380 160 440 220 450 C200 410 220 380 220 360" fill="url(#leafGrad)" opacity="0.95"/>
    <path d="M292 360 C352 380 352 440 292 450 C312 410 292 380 292 360" fill="url(#leafGrad)" opacity="0.95"/>

    <!-- stem -->
    <rect x="250" y="360" width="12" height="90" rx="6" fill="#7ccf79" />

    <!-- sparkles -->
    <g fill="#fff" opacity="0.9">
      <polygon points="100,70 106,90 124,96 106,102 100,122 94,102 76,96 94,90" fill="#fff7e6" opacity="0.9"/>
      <polygon points="420,80 426,94 440,100 426,106 420,120 414,106 400,100 414,94" fill="#fff2f8" opacity="0.95"/>
      <circle cx="360" cy="140" r="6" fill="#fff" opacity="0.9"/>
      <circle cx="420" cy="200" r="5" fill="#fff" opacity="0.85"/>
      <circle cx="120" cy="180" r="4" fill="#fff" opacity="0.85"/>
    </g>

    <!-- small butterfly -->
    <g transform="translate(380,240) scale(0.6)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="18" ry="28" fill="#ffb6c1" transform="rotate(-20)"/>
      <ellipse cx="-14" cy="-6" rx="14" ry="20" fill="#ffd1e8" transform="rotate(-40)"/>
      <ellipse cx="12" cy="-6" rx="14" ry="20" fill="#ffd1e8" transform="rotate(0)"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="6" r="4" fill="#5b3a29"/>
    </g>

    <!-- second butterfly -->
    <g transform="translate(140,200) scale(0.5)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="18" ry="28" fill="#ffeaa7" transform="rotate(15)"/>
      <ellipse cx="-14" cy="-6" rx="14" ry="20" fill="#fff2c1" transform="rotate(-10)"/>
      <ellipse cx="12" cy="-6" rx="14" ry="20" fill="#fff2c1" transform="rotate(30)"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="6" r="4" fill="#5b3a29"/>
    </g>

  </g>
</svg>
